overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character with a weapon traversing a snowy wilderness at night. The character walks from a grassy area near a wooden shed, through a shallow stream, across a wooden bridge, and continues along a snow-covered mountain trail under a starry sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily from the wooden shelter area toward the stream ahead

entered.detail: small wooden structure with green roof and open windows
shallow water flowing between snow-covered banks
large boulders dusted with snow along the stream edge
snow-laden evergreen trees against the dark mountain backdrop

segments.scene_description: The character begins near a small wooden shelter with a green roof, walking across patchy snow and dead grass toward a shallow stream. Snow-covered rocks line the left side while distant pine trees stand against the starry night sky.

events.description: character steps into the shallow stream, creating splashes
character exits the stream onto the rocky bank

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow stream toward the small waterfall ahead

entered.detail: small cascade where the stream flows over rocks
boulder partially submerged in the stream

segments.scene_description: The character wades through the shallow stream, with water splashing around their boots. A small waterfall becomes visible ahead as they approach the far bank, passing large rocks on the left side.

events.description: character steps onto the wooden bridge crossing the water
character reaches the end of the bridge and steps onto land

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge while observing the waterfall and rapids below

entered.detail: long wooden footbridge with railings spanning the river
tall waterfall cascading down the rocky cliff face
steep rock face covered in snow and ice

segments.scene_description: The character climbs onto a wooden footbridge that spans the rushing water, with a magnificent waterfall visible in the distance. The bridge offers views of snow-covered cliffs to the right as the character crosses to the far side.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain trail with ice walls

events.description: character leaves the bridge and steps onto deep snow-covered terrain

agents.ego_description: trekking along the snow-covered path surrounded by ice formations and pine trees

entered.detail: trail blanketed in deep snow with visible footprints
blue-tinted ice walls and frozen vegetation along the path
evergreen trees heavily laden with fresh snow
mountain range visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge behind, the character continues along a snow-covered mountain trail flanked by blue ice formations on the right and snow-laden pine trees on the left. The path winds through the winter landscape with distant mountains visible under the starry sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet woodland shelter into a rugged, frozen mountain pass under a starry night sky. It begins near a small wooden shelter with a green roof, moving across patchy snow and dead grass toward a shallow stream lined with snow-covered rocks. As the character wades through the splashing water, the scene opens up to reveal a small waterfall ahead before the camera follows them onto a wooden footbridge spanning the rushing current. The view then expands to show towering snow-covered cliffs and a magnificent distant waterfall as the character crosses to the far bank. Finally, the path shifts from the bridge to a winding mountain trail, flanked by blue ice formations and snow-laden pine trees that lead deeper into the winter wilderness.
